notes: Stage-1 inference with the merged exp_022 GRPO pass-4 policy. SINGLE variable changed from exp_020: model_id (pass-3 -> pass-4). Same prompts (3 MCQ few-shots) and sampling config to stay in-distribution with GRPO training. The merged model is built by merge_and_push.ipynb (checkpoint-130; the 12h pod timed out at step 137/138, LR already annealed to ~2e-7 so 130 is effectively final). PER REVISED CRITERION (see exp_022 notes): the decisive signal is a stage-1-ONLY leaderboard submission vs the 0.586 pass-2/pass-3 floor, NOT local %. Build submission with scripts/build_submission_from_responses.py and submit raw before any rescue layer.
